name: hc_clean_row_count
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_CLEAN

name: hc_clean_missing_patient_id
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_CLEAN WHERE patient_id IS NULL OR TRIM(patient_id) = ''

name: hc_clean_allowed_le_submitted
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_CLEAN WHERE TRY_TO_DECIMAL(allowed_amount, 18, 2) > TRY_TO_DECIMAL(submitted_amount, 18, 2)

name: hc_missing_patient_id
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_MISSING_DATA WHERE patient_id IS NULL OR TRIM(patient_id) = ''

name: hc_format_dob_iso
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_FORMAT_ERRORS WHERE TRY_TO_DATE(dob, 'YYYY-MM-DD') IS NULL

name: hc_format_effective_date_iso
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_FORMAT_ERRORS WHERE TRY_TO_DATE(effective_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') IS NULL

name: hc_format_submitted_amount_numeric
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_FORMAT_ERRORS WHERE TRY_TO_DECIMAL(submitted_amount, 18, 2) IS NULL

name: hc_constraint_future_service_date
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_CONSTRAINT_ERRORS WHERE TRY_TO_DATE(service_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') > CURRENT_DATE()

name: hc_constraint_effective_date_le_end_date
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_CONSTRAINT_ERRORS WHERE TRY_TO_DATE(effective_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') > TRY_TO_DATE(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

name: hc_constraint_allowed_le_submitted
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_CONSTRAINT_ERRORS WHERE TRY_TO_DECIMAL(allowed_amount, 18, 2) > TRY_TO_DECIMAL(submitted_amount, 18, 2)

name: hc_constraint_approved_le_submitted
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_CONSTRAINT_ERRORS WHERE TRY_TO_DECIMAL(approved_amount, 18, 2) > TRY_TO_DECIMAL(submitted_amount, 18, 2)

name: hc_constraint_valid_blood_type
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_HC_CONSTRAINT_ERRORS WHERE blood_type NOT IN ('A+', 'A-', 'B+', 'B-', 'AB+', 'AB-', 'O+', 'O-')
